meta.description: ETF historical monthly price data and computed returns (Reconstructed with realistic market volatility and verified benchmark returns)
meta.data_quality_note: Reviewed and corrected 2026-07-09/10. All 119 ETFs have annual_calendar returns verified against real-world data from official issuer sources (Vanguard/BetaShares/VanEck fact sheets) and financial data providers (Yahoo Finance, FinanceCharts), covering full available history back to each fund's actual inception date. Several funds had incorrect inception dates in the original file (implying years of returns before the fund existed) -- these were corrected. 13 tickers (AGVT, BILL, DBBF, ETHA, GBND, QPON, VBND, VDIF, VEFI, VGSH, VICF, VIF, VMIN) were removed because reliable calendar-year return data could not be located. MONTHLY PRICES: the monthly_prices series has been regenerated for every ticker so that each calendar year's Dec-to-Dec price change exactly reproduces the verified annual_calendar return. Important: month-to-month movements WITHIN each year are synthetic (randomly generated with category-appropriate volatility), not real historical monthly prices -- only the annual endpoints are real. Years with no verified annual return (e.g. stub months before a fund's first full year of data, or 2026 year-to-date where trailing.ytd was unavailable) use an unconstrained low-drift random walk and should not be treated as accurate at all. trailing (1m/3m/6m/1y/3y/5y/10y/ytd) and annualised (3y/5y/10y/since_inception) fields were recomputed directly from the new price series so all fields in the file are now internally consistent with each other, even though sub-annual price movements remain synthetic.

DIA.name: SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF Trust
